changeSet.author: hhund
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX read_access_id_version_index ON read_access USING btree (resource_id, resource_version); CREATE INDEX read_access_id_version_type_organization_index ON read_access USING btree (resource_id, resource_version, access_type, organization_id) WHERE organization_id IS NOT NULL;

UPDATE activity_definitions r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.activity_definition_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT activity_definition_id, version FROM current_activity_definitions); CREATE INDEX activity_definition_id_current_index ON activity_definitions (activity_definition_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT activity_definition_id, version, activity_definition FROM activity_definitions WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE binaries r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.binary_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT binary_id, version FROM current_binaries); CREATE INDEX binary_id_current_index ON binaries (binary_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT binary_id, version, binary_json, binary_oid, binary_size FROM binaries WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE bundles r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.bundle_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT bundle_id, version FROM current_bundles); CREATE INDEX bundle_id_current_index ON bundles (bundle_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT bundle_id, version, bundle FROM bundles WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE code_systems r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.code_system_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT code_system_id, version FROM current_code_systems); CREATE INDEX code_system_id_current_index ON code_systems (code_system_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT code_system_id, version, code_system FROM code_systems WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE document_references r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.document_reference_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT document_reference_id, version FROM current_document_references); CREATE INDEX document_reference_id_current_index ON document_references (document_reference_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT document_reference_id, version, document_reference FROM document_references WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
SELECT endpoint_id, version, endpoint FROM endpoints WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE groups r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.group_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT group_id, version FROM current_groups); CREATE INDEX group_id_current_index ON groups (group_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT group_id, version, group_json FROM groups WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE healthcare_services r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.healthcare_service_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT healthcare_service_id, version FROM current_healthcare_services); CREATE INDEX healthcare_service_id_current_index ON healthcare_services (healthcare_service_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT healthcare_service_id, version, healthcare_service FROM healthcare_services WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE libraries r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.library_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT library_id, version FROM current_libraries); CREATE INDEX library_id_current_index ON libraries (library_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT library_id, version, library FROM libraries WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE locations r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.location_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT location_id, version FROM current_locations); CREATE INDEX location_id_current_index ON locations (location_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT location_id, version, location FROM locations WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE measure_reports r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.measure_report_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT measure_report_id, version FROM current_measure_reports); CREATE INDEX measure_report_id_current_index ON measure_reports (measure_report_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT measure_report_id, version, measure_report FROM measure_reports WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE measures r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.measure_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT measure_id, version FROM current_measures); CREATE INDEX measure_id_current_index ON measures (measure_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT measure_id, version, measure FROM measures WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE naming_systems r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.naming_system_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT naming_system_id, version FROM current_naming_systems); CREATE INDEX naming_system_id_current_index ON naming_systems (naming_system_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT naming_system_id, version, naming_system FROM naming_systems WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
SELECT organization_affiliation_id, version, organization_affiliation FROM organization_affiliations WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
SELECT organization_id, version, organization FROM organizations WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE patients r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.patient_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT patient_id, version FROM current_patients); CREATE INDEX patient_id_current_index ON patients (patient_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT patient_id, version, patient FROM patients WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE practitioner_roles r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.practitioner_role_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT practitioner_role_id, version FROM current_practitioner_roles); CREATE INDEX practitioner_role_id_current_index ON practitioner_roles (practitioner_role_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT practitioner_role_id, version, practitioner_role FROM practitioner_roles WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE practitioners r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.practitioner_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT practitioner_id, version FROM current_practitioners); CREATE INDEX practitioner_id_current_index ON practitioners (practitioner_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT practitioner_id, version, practitioner FROM practitioners WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE provenances r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.provenance_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT provenance_id, version FROM current_provenances); CREATE INDEX provenance_id_current_index ON provenances (provenance_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT provenance_id, version, provenance FROM provenances WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE questionnaire_responses r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.questionnaire_response_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT questionnaire_response_id, version FROM current_questionnaire_responses); CREATE INDEX questionnaire_response_id_current_index ON questionnaire_responses (questionnaire_response_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT questionnaire_response_id, version, questionnaire_response FROM questionnaire_responses WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE questionnaires r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.questionnaire_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT questionnaire_id, version FROM current_questionnaires); CREATE INDEX questionnaire_id_current_index ON questionnaires (questionnaire_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT questionnaire_id, version, questionnaire FROM questionnaires WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE research_studies r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.research_study_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT research_study_id, version FROM current_research_studies); CREATE INDEX research_study_id_current_index ON research_studies (research_study_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT research_study_id, version, research_study FROM research_studies WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE structure_definition_snapshots r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.structure_definition_snapshot_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT structure_definition_snapshot_id, version FROM current_structure_definition_snapshots); CREATE INDEX structure_definition_snapshot_id_current_index ON structure_definition_snapshots (structure_definition_snapshot_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT structure_definition_snapshot_id, version, structure_definition_snapshot FROM structure_definition_snapshots WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE structure_definitions r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.structure_definition_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT structure_definition_id, version FROM current_structure_definitions); CREATE INDEX structure_definition_id_current_index ON structure_definitions (structure_definition_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT structure_definition_id, version, structure_definition FROM structure_definitions WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE subscriptions r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.subscription_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT subscription_id, version FROM current_subscriptions); CREATE INDEX subscription_id_current_index ON subscriptions (subscription_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT subscription_id, version, subscription FROM subscriptions WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
SELECT task_id, version, task FROM tasks WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;
changeSet.sql: UPDATE value_sets r SET current = FALSE WHERE (r.value_set_id, r.version) NOT IN (SELECT value_set_id, version FROM current_value_sets); CREATE INDEX value_set_id_current_index ON value_sets (value_set_id, current DESC);
changeSet.createView: SELECT value_set_id, version, value_set FROM value_sets WHERE current AND deleted IS NULL;

SELECT id, version, type, resource FROM ( SELECT activity_definition_id AS id, version, 'ActivityDefinition'::text AS type, activity_definition AS resource FROM current_activity_definitions UNION SELECT binary_id AS id, version, 'Binary'::text AS type, binary_json AS resource FROM current_binaries UNION SELECT bundle_id AS id, version, 'Bundle'::text AS type, bundle AS resource FROM current_bundles UNION SELECT code_system_id AS id, version, 'CodeSystem'::text AS type, code_system AS resource FROM current_code_systems UNION SELECT document_reference_id AS id, version, 'DocumentReference'::text AS type, document_reference AS resource FROM current_document_references UNION SELECT endpoint_id AS id, version, 'Endpoint'::text AS type, endpoint AS resource FROM current_endpoints UNION SELECT group_id AS id, version, 'Group'::text AS type, group_json AS resource FROM current_groups UNION SELECT healthcare_service_id AS id, version, 'HealthcareService'::text AS type, healthcare_service AS resource FROM current_healthcare_services UNION SELECT library_id AS id, version, 'Library'::text AS type, library AS resource FROM current_libraries UNION SELECT location_id AS id, version, 'Location'::text AS type, location AS resource FROM current_locations UNION SELECT measure_report_id AS id, version, 'MeasureReport'::text AS type, measure_report AS resource FROM current_measure_reports UNION SELECT measure_id AS id, version, 'Measure'::text AS type, measure AS resource FROM current_measures UNION SELECT naming_system_id AS id, version, 'NamingSystem'::text AS type, naming_system AS resource FROM current_naming_systems UNION SELECT organization_id AS id, version, 'Organization'::text AS type, organization AS resource FROM current_organizations UNION SELECT organization_affiliation_id AS id, version, 'OrganizationAffiliation'::text AS type, organization_affiliation AS resource FROM current_organization_affiliations UNION SELECT patient_id AS id, version, 'Patient'::text AS type, patient AS resource FROM current_patients UNION SELECT practitioner_role_id AS id, version, 'PractitionerRole'::text AS type, practitioner_role AS resource FROM current_practitioner_roles UNION SELECT practitioner_id AS id, version, 'Practitioner'::text AS type, practitioner AS resource FROM current_practitioners UNION SELECT provenance_id AS id, version, 'Provenance'::text AS type, provenance AS resource FROM current_provenances UNION SELECT questionnaire_id AS id, version, 'Questionnaire'::text AS type, questionnaire AS resource FROM current_questionnaires UNION SELECT questionnaire_response_id AS id, version, 'QuestionnaireResponse'::text AS type, questionnaire_response AS resource FROM current_questionnaire_responses UNION SELECT research_study_id AS id, version, 'ResearchStudy'::text AS type, research_study AS resource FROM current_research_studies UNION SELECT structure_definition_id AS id, version, 'StructureDefinition'::text AS type, structure_definition AS resource FROM current_structure_definitions UNION SELECT subscription_id AS id, version, 'Subscription'::text AS type, subscription AS resource FROM current_subscriptions UNION SELECT task_id AS id, version, 'Task'::text AS type, task AS resource FROM current_tasks UNION SELECT value_set_id AS id, version, 'ValueSet'::text AS type, value_set AS resource FROM current_value_sets ) AS current_all

SELECT id, version, type, resource FROM ( SELECT activity_definition_id AS id, version, 'ActivityDefinition'::text AS type, activity_definition AS resource FROM current_activity_definitions UNION SELECT binary_id AS id, version, 'Binary'::text AS type, binary_json AS resource FROM current_binaries UNION SELECT bundle_id AS id, version, 'Bundle'::text AS type, bundle AS resource FROM current_bundles UNION SELECT code_system_id AS id, version, 'CodeSystem'::text AS type, code_system AS resource FROM current_code_systems UNION SELECT document_reference_id AS id, version, 'DocumentReference'::text AS type, document_reference AS resource FROM current_document_references UNION SELECT endpoint_id AS id, version, 'Endpoint'::text AS type, endpoint AS resource FROM current_endpoints UNION SELECT group_id AS id, version, 'Group'::text AS type, group_json AS resource FROM current_groups UNION SELECT healthcare_service_id AS id, version, 'HealthcareService'::text AS type, healthcare_service AS resource FROM current_healthcare_services UNION SELECT library_id AS id, version, 'Library'::text AS type, library AS resource FROM current_libraries UNION SELECT location_id AS id, version, 'Location'::text AS type, location AS resource FROM current_locations UNION SELECT measure_report_id AS id, version, 'MeasureReport'::text AS type, measure_report AS resource FROM current_measure_reports UNION SELECT measure_id AS id, version, 'Measure'::text AS type, measure AS resource FROM current_measures UNION SELECT naming_system_id AS id, version, 'NamingSystem'::text AS type, naming_system AS resource FROM current_naming_systems UNION SELECT organization_id AS id, version, 'Organization'::text AS type, organization AS resource FROM current_organizations UNION SELECT organization_affiliation_id AS id, version, 'OrganizationAffiliation'::text AS type, organization_affiliation AS resource FROM current_organization_affiliations UNION SELECT patient_id AS id, version, 'Patient'::text AS type, patient AS resource FROM current_patients UNION SELECT practitioner_role_id AS id, version, 'PractitionerRole'::text AS type, practitioner_role AS resource FROM current_practitioner_roles UNION SELECT practitioner_id AS id, version, 'Practitioner'::text AS type, practitioner AS resource FROM current_practitioners UNION SELECT provenance_id AS id, version, 'Provenance'::text AS type, provenance AS resource FROM current_provenances UNION SELECT questionnaire_id AS id, version, 'Questionnaire'::text AS type, questionnaire AS resource FROM current_questionnaires UNION SELECT research_study_id AS id, version, 'ResearchStudy'::text AS type, research_study AS resource FROM current_research_studies UNION SELECT structure_definition_id AS id, version, 'StructureDefinition'::text AS type, structure_definition AS resource FROM current_structure_definitions UNION SELECT subscription_id AS id, version, 'Subscription'::text AS type, subscription AS resource FROM current_subscriptions UNION SELECT value_set_id AS id, version, 'ValueSet'::text AS type, value_set AS resource FROM current_value_sets ) AS current_all_read_access
